ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skill_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill assessment */,
  "question" TEXT /* The skill or competency being assessed */,
  "not_required" INTEGER /* Number of respondents indicating the skill is not required */,
  "required_half_day" INTEGER /* Number of respondents indicating the skill requires half a day of training */,
  "required_less_than_half_day" INTEGER /* Number of respondents indicating the skill requires less than half a day of training */,
  "required_more_than_half_day" INTEGER /* Number of respondents indicating the skill requires more than half a day of training */,
  "yes_frequently" INTEGER /* Number of respondents indicating the skill is used frequently */,
  "yes_infrequently" INTEGER /* Number of respondents indicating the skill is used infrequently */,
  "skill_category" TEXT /* Category of the skill (e.g., clinical, administrative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the skill */,
  "required_level" TEXT /* Minimum required level of proficiency (e.g., basic, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the assessment was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assessment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professionals" (
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare professional */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the professional */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the professional (e.g., doctor, nurse, technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the professional */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional's supervisor */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the professional was hired */,
  "last_assessment_date" TEXT /* Last date the professional was assessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the professional (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_professionals_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment result */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skill assessment being evaluated */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the professional being assessed */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the professional in the assessment */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was taken */,
  "assessment_category" TEXT /* Category of the assessment (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who administered the assessment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes from the administrator */,
  "self_assessment" INTEGER /* Indicate if the result is from a self-assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_administrator_id FOREIGN KEY ("administrator_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES skill_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skill assessment being addressed */,
  "session_title" TEXT /* Title of the training session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training session */,
  "date_scheduled" TEXT /* Date when the training session is scheduled */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who will conduct the training */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the training session will be held */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the session */,
  "enrolled_professionals" TEXT /* List of professionals enrolled in the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., workshop, webinar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skill_assessments ("assessment_id")
)
